title: Technique Level 1B — Expansion
summary: Expands C major five-finger technique with eighth notes, quarter rests, Hanon-style repeated patterns, and skip-of-a-third figures. Longer phrases up to 8 measures. Single-hand exercises for both right and left hand.

exercises.title: Eighth Notes — C Position Run (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand plays continuous eighth notes ascending and descending through C4–G4.
exercises.goal: Introduce eighth-note rhythm in C position; keep each note exactly half a beat.

exercises.title: Mixed Quarter and Eighth Notes (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand combines quarter notes with pairs of eighth notes in C4–G4.
exercises.goal: Alternate between quarter and eighth-note values cleanly within a measure.

exercises.title: Eighth Notes in 2/4 (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand plays four eighth notes per 2/4 measure through C position.
exercises.goal: Feel the two-beat pulse with four subdivisions per measure in the right hand.

exercises.title: Quarter Rests — Staccato Drill (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand plays quarter notes separated by quarter rests, building rhythmic accuracy and rest awareness.
exercises.goal: Count quarter rests precisely; stop sound cleanly on each rest.

exercises.title: Hanon Pattern — C Position (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand repeats the classic five-finger Hanon ascending-descending pattern through C4–G4.
exercises.goal: Build finger independence through the repeated C D E F G F E D cell.

exercises.title: Skips of a Third (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand practices melodic skips of a third (C–E, D–F, E–G) through C4–G4.
exercises.goal: Develop accuracy on third-skips without looking at the keys.

exercises.title: Steps and Skips — Eighth-Note Pattern (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand alternates stepwise pairs of eighth notes with a quarter-note skip.
exercises.goal: Combine step and skip motions fluidly at a steady eighth-note pulse.

exercises.title: Extended Phrase — C Position (RH)
exercises.summary: Eight-measure right-hand phrase combining quarter notes and eighth-note runs through C position.
exercises.goal: Sustain concentration and evenness across a longer musical phrase.

exercises.title: Repeated-Note Drill — Eighth Notes (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand repeats each C-position note twice in eighth notes before stepping to the next.
exercises.goal: Develop finger repetition speed and evenness through note-doubling.

exercises.title: Varied Rhythms — C Position (RH)
exercises.summary: Right hand mixes half, quarter, and eighth notes through C position in a flowing phrase.
exercises.goal: Read and execute three different rhythmic values within the same exercise.

exercises.title: Eighth Notes — C3 Position Run (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand plays continuous eighth notes ascending and descending through C3–G3.
exercises.goal: Introduce eighth-note rhythm in the left-hand C3 position.

exercises.title: Mixed Quarter and Eighth Notes (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand combines quarter notes with pairs of eighth notes through C3–G3.
exercises.goal: Alternate between quarter and eighth-note values cleanly in the left hand.

exercises.title: Eighth Notes in 2/4 (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand plays four eighth notes per 2/4 measure through C3 position.
exercises.goal: Feel the two-beat subdivision in the left hand through C3 position.

exercises.title: Quarter Rests — Staccato Drill (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand plays quarter notes separated by quarter rests through C3 position.
exercises.goal: Count quarter rests precisely in the left hand; release sound cleanly on each rest.

exercises.title: Hanon Pattern — C3 Position (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand repeats the five-finger Hanon ascending-descending pattern through C3–G3.
exercises.goal: Build left-hand finger independence through the repeated C D E F G F E D cell.

exercises.title: Skips of a Third (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand practices melodic skips of a third (C–E, D–F, E–G) in C3 position.
exercises.goal: Develop left-hand accuracy on third-skips without looking at the keys.

exercises.title: Steps and Skips — Eighth-Note Pattern (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand alternates stepwise pairs of eighth notes with a quarter-note skip through C3 position.
exercises.goal: Combine step and skip motions fluidly in the left hand.

exercises.title: Extended Phrase — C3 Position (LH)
exercises.summary: Eight-measure left-hand phrase combining quarter notes and eighth-note runs through C3 position.
exercises.goal: Maintain even tone and tempo in the left hand across a longer musical phrase.

exercises.title: Repeated-Note Drill — Eighth Notes (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand repeats each C3-position note twice in eighth notes before stepping to the next.
exercises.goal: Develop left-hand finger repetition and evenness through note-doubling.

exercises.title: Varied Rhythms — C3 Position (LH)
exercises.summary: Left hand mixes half, quarter, and eighth notes through C3 position in a flowing phrase.
exercises.goal: Read and execute three different rhythmic values in the left hand within the same exercise.
